title: Sussex face Heidelberg United in Promotion League final tomorrow
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club of Mossel Bay's men's team faces Heidelberg United in the SWD Cricket Promotion League final match tomorrow, Saturday 24 February.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club of Mossel Bay's men's team faces Heidelberg United in the SWD Cricket Promotion League final match tomorrow, Saturday 24 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final will be played at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn. Play is scheduled to start at 10:00.","html":"The final will be played at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn. Play is scheduled to start at 10:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advanced","html":"Advanced"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex advanced to the Promotion League final after a close, two-wicket win over Ramblers of George on Saturday, 17 February.","html":"Sussex advanced to the Promotion League final after a close, two-wicket win over Ramblers of George on Saturday, 17 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramblers were the firm favourites for this semi-final clash as they had been undefeated this season and finished top of the log in group A, thus securing a home semi-final at the Rosemore sports grounds in George.","html":"Ramblers were the firm favourites for this semi-final clash as they had been undefeated this season and finished top of the log in group A, thus securing a home semi-final at the Rosemore sports grounds in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex, playing in group B, were on track for a home semi-final, but losing two games derailed this ambition.","html":"Sussex, playing in group B, were on track for a home semi-final, but losing two games derailed this ambition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game against Ramblers was reduced to 41 overs due to the wet outfield and play started later.","html":"The game against Ramblers was reduced to 41 overs due to the wet outfield and play started later."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex elected to bowl first after winning the toss. Ramblers started off well, putting on 39 runs for the first wicket.","html":"Sussex elected to bowl first after winning the toss. Ramblers started off well, putting on 39 runs for the first wicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Loss of wickets","html":"Loss of wickets "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The constant loss of wickets after the first wicket partnership meant that they could not build any momentum in their innings.","html":"The constant loss of wickets after the first wicket partnership meant that they could not build any momentum in their innings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramblers were eventually bowled out for 147 in 39.1 overs. The spin trio kept the batters in check, and they accounted for eight of the 10 wickets to fall.","html":"Ramblers were eventually bowled out for 147 in 39.1 overs. The spin trio kept the batters in check, and they accounted for eight of the 10 wickets to fall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The spinners finished with the following figures: Raven Kemmies, 9 overs 2 wickets for 19 runs; Joshua Rossouw, 7 overs 3 wickets for 34 runs; and captain Rowan Groenewald 8 overs 3 wickets for 33 runs.","html":"The spinners finished with the following figures: Raven Kemmies, 9 overs 2 wickets for 19 runs; Joshua Rossouw, 7 overs 3 wickets for 34 runs; and captain Rowan Groenewald 8 overs 3 wickets for 33 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex started off well after the loss of a wicket early with a 51-run partnership for the second wicket between Rowan Groenewald and Geon Burns.","html":"Sussex started off well after the loss of a wicket early with a 51-run partnership for the second wicket between Rowan Groenewald and Geon Burns."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Edge of their seats","html":"Edge of their seats"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Sussex spectators, players and supporters following the game via live WhatsApp updates were on the edge of their seats as the game shifted back and forth.","html":"The Sussex spectators, players and supporters following the game via live WhatsApp updates were on the edge of their seats as the game shifted back and forth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramblers fought back, taking two wickets with the score on 65 and then two wickets again in the 90s. Captain Rowan proved that age is nothing but a number, playing a composed innings of 37 runs as the other batters chipped in with scores to keep the scoreboard ticking.","html":"Ramblers fought back, taking two wickets with the score on 65 and then two wickets again in the 90s. Captain Rowan proved that age is nothing but a number, playing a composed innings of 37 runs as the other batters chipped in with scores to keep the scoreboard ticking."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winning runs","html":"Winning runs "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex scored the winning runs in the 40th over with eight wickets down. Rowan led his team exceptionally, with his all-round performance and was the man of the match.","html":"Sussex scored the winning runs in the 40th over with eight wickets down. Rowan led his team exceptionally, with his all-round performance and was the man of the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With this win Sussex kept their promotion dream alive and now face Heidelberg United, who defeated Thembalethu by 56 runs.","html":"With this win Sussex kept their promotion dream alive and now face Heidelberg United, who defeated Thembalethu by 56 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex CC is based at the D’Almeida cricket ground. Most of the players come from underprivileged backgrounds and are unemployed youths.","html":"Sussex CC is based at the D’Almeida cricket ground. Most of the players come from underprivileged backgrounds and are unemployed youths."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The community club struggles week by week to ensure that transport is secured for away games and meals/drinks can be provided for players in the very hot conditions over summer.","html":"The community club struggles week by week to ensure that transport is secured for away games and meals/drinks can be provided for players in the very hot conditions over summer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Equipment","html":"Equipment"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The quality of the facilities (cricket nets) and available equipment, such as a pitch cover and scoreboard, remain a challenge. No team can achieve success without the support of sponsors and Sussex CC thanks all the sponsors who supported them.","html":"The quality of the facilities (cricket nets) and available equipment, such as a pitch cover and scoreboard, remain a challenge. No team can achieve success without the support of sponsors and Sussex CC thanks all the sponsors who supported them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex appeals to potential sponsors to please assist the club to grow the game and develop its cricketers. Contact the club executive ([email protected]) or the chairman, Earle Peterson (083 235 2862) if you can assist in any way.","html":"Sussex appeals to potential sponsors to please assist the club to grow the game and develop its cricketers. Contact the club executive ([email protected]) or the chairman, Earle Peterson (083 235 2862) if you can assist in any way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":" We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]

images.alt: Sussex face Heidelberg United in Promotion League final tomorrow
